title: Original Students Voicing Opinions in Today’s Elections (VOTE) Act
short_title: Original Students Voicing Opinions in Today’s Elections (VOTE) Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
crs_summary: Original Students Voicing Opinions in Today's Elections (VOTE) Act This bill directs the Election Assistance Commission to carry out a pilot program providing funds, during FY2025, to local educational agencies (LEAs) for initiatives that provide 12th graders with voter registration information. LEAs must consult with their state and local election officials in developing the initiatives.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
